Package com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai.generated.model

Class ChatCompletionResponseMessage

java.lang.Object
com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai.generated.model.ChatCompletionResponseMessage
public class ChatCompletionResponseMessage extends Object
A chat completion message generated by the model.
